title: Coverage ledger schema + public renderer (taxonomy; covered/partial/missing; non-empty frontier)
context: ATLTUAE's deliverable is the cited synthesis plus a public ledger of its own ignorance; the coverage ledger makes the engine's gaps as visible as its knowledge. This M0 subsystem defines the ledger schema (a taxonomy with covered/partial/missing status and an explicit, non-empty frontier) and a public renderer so each cycle publishes an honest coverage map.
objective: Implement the coverage-ledger schema and its public renderer: a domain taxonomy with covered/partial/missing status per node and an explicit frontier that stays non-empty until exhaustion is proven, rendered as a public artifact each cycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Defines a coverage-ledger schema: a taxonomy of nodes each marked covered / partial / missing, with an explicit frontier list
The frontier is always non-empty until exhaustion is proven, making the engine's ignorance visible alongside its knowledge
A public renderer emits the ledger as a human-readable artifact each cycle (covered/partial/missing + frontier)
Ledger entries reference provenance so coverage claims are themselves traceable
